tests.name: graph view settings router delegates reset-all requests
graph view settings router updates filter patterns and publishes plugin patterns
graph view settings router persists update-show-orphans through config updates
graph view settings router persists update-bidirectional-mode through config updates
graph view settings router persists update-particle-setting through config updates
graph view settings router persists update-max-files through config updates
graph view settings router updates direction mode and publishes the full direction payload
graph view settings router normalizes direction color updates before persisting them
graph view settings router updates label visibility and publishes it immediately
graph view settings router updates edge visibility and refreshes graph controls
graph view settings router re-enables plugins and rebuilds the plugin-owned edges from cache
graph view settings router returns false for unrelated messages
settingsMessages/updates/graphControls updates graph control config maps and publishes refreshed controls
settingsMessages/updates/graphControls updates each graph control message type with the matching config key
settingsMessages/updates/graphControls returns false for unrelated messages without updating settings
settingsMessages/updates/filterPatterns stores filter patterns and publishes plugin patterns
graph view settings update message delegates reset-all requests
graph view settings update message updates filter patterns and publishes plugin patterns
graph view settings update message persists update-show-orphans through config updates
graph view settings update message persists update-bidirectional-mode through config updates
graph view settings update message persists update-particle-setting through config updates
graph view settings update message persists update-max-files through config updates
graph view settings update message persists plugin order and reprocesses the listed plugins
graph view settings update message updates label visibility and publishes it immediately
graph view settings update message returns false for unrelated messages
graph view settings toggle message re-enables plugins, persists the disabled-plugin list, and rebuilds cached plugin edges
graph view settings toggle message disables plugins, persists the expanded disabled-plugin set, and rebuilds cached plugin edges
graph view settings toggle message disables one plugin without dropping existing disabled plugins
graph view settings toggle message returns false for unrelated messages
graph view settings toggle message returns immediately because toggles rebuild cached plugin edges instead of reprocessing files
graph view settings direction message updates direction mode and publishes the full direction payload
graph view settings direction message normalizes direction color updates before persisting them
graph view settings direction message uses the default direction mode and default direction color when config values are absent
graph view settings direction message returns false for unrelated messages
settingsMessages/updates/labels persists show-label updates and publishes them
settingsMessages/updates/pluginOrder stores the plugin order and reprocesses the listed plugins
settingsMessages/updates/simple updates supported config keys and ignores unrelated messages
